strengths: Proven full-stack engineering experience across various technologies and domains
Strong background in software craftsmanship, testing, and DevOps practices
Entrepreneurial spirit demonstrated through founding GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy and AI-powered product development
No clear evidence of cloud expertise or experience with major cloud providers beyond AWS CDK
Limited experience in advising customers or partners on adopting cutting-edge technologies
response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in AI strategy and AI-powered product development, which are crucial for the Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy.
